question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters of the thesis. It only provides a development plan (timeline) and discusses the problem statement and relevance, but fails to outline the actual structural components (e.g., theoretical part, methodology, experimental part, conclusions) of the final document.

question: Description
feedback: The text describes the problem and the relevance of the topic well, but it does not describe the contents of the thesis sections. There is no summary of what will be covered in each chapter of the work itself.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be understood from this text. While the 'Development Plan' table shows a timeline of tasks, it does not reflect the structural organization of the thesis chapters or the logical flow of the research content.
